娼館での仕事など、私には不向きだと思っていたが……<br>やってみればなんとかな:
I thought brothel work wouldn't suit me... but I suppose things work
out if you give it a try.
人で賑わう酒場の影、ウィステリアはどこか自慢げに呟いていた。<br>誰も、彼女の:
In the shadows of the bustling tavern, Wisteria muttered with a hint
of pride. No one seemed to notice her presence.
<user>との行為以来、彼女もまた娼館で働くように<br>なっていたのだが、娼:
Since her night with the Commander, she started working at the
brothel and became quite popular as a courtesan.
客と自然に会話をしようとすると、やはり上手くいかないが……<br>まあ、潜入調査:
Can't talk naturally to customers... but if I think of it as undercover
roleplay as a courtesan, I can manage.
……しかし、誰も私だと気づかないとはな。<br>普段からあまり人前に出てないせい:
...But no one realizes it's me. Maybe it's because I rarely show myself
in public. Well, that's more convenient, I suppose.
情事の最中に”戦神”などと呼ばれれば、互いに興ざめだろう。<br>そんなことを考:
If someone called her 'War God' during a tryst, it would kill the mood
for both parties. She was thinking just that, when...
――へえ、いろんな子がいるんですね。: —Huh, you have all sorts of girls here.
聞き覚えのある声に影から様子をうかがうと、<br>同じ部隊の同僚がルディアの接客:
Peeking from the shadows at the sound of a familiar voice, she saw a
colleague from the same unit being served by Ludia.
森に潜んでいたウィステリアに気づかず彼女と行為をおこなった同僚――<br>まさし:
The colleague who unknowingly had sex with her while she hid in the
forest—he was the one who caused Wisteria's lewd dreams.
この子はいかがですか？ とっても人気の子ですよ。<br>１回この子を指名すると、:
How about this girl? She's very popular. Once someone requests her,
they never ask for anyone else.
うわあ……めちゃくちゃいいですね。<br>うちの隊にいる、綺麗な子に似てるかも…: Wow... that's amazing. She kinda looks like a pretty girl in my unit...
じゃあこの子で！ と男が指名する。<br>笑顔で頷いたルディアは、そっとウィステ:
'Then I'll take this one!' the man said, choosing her. Nodding with a
smile, Ludia quietly approached Wisteria.
ん……相手は私、か……。<br>もしも彼が気づいていないなら……: Mmm... so it's me he wants? If he hasn't noticed...
……ちょうどいい。<br>少し、試してみようか。: ...Perfect. Should I test him a little?
まるで狩りに出かけた時のように、<br>密やかな声で、ウィステリアは呟いたのだっ:
As if she were heading out on a hunt, Wisteria muttered in a hushed
